channel.title: Capitalist ME: Global News, Business, Politics, Finance and Sports
channel.description: Capitalist ME offers global news, in-depth coverage on business, politics, finance, culture, sports, and the latest world events. Stay informed on key issues

image.title: Capitalist ME: Global News, Business, Politics, Finance and Sports

item.title: Apollo Launches £5.7 Billion Bid for easyJet as Private Equity Battle Intensifies
item.description:
U.S. private equity firm Apollo Global Management has launched a £5.7 billion takeover offer for easyJet, intensifying the battle with rival bidder Castlelake and putting the future ownership of the British airline under the spotlight.

Key points:
• Apollo Global Management offered £7.15 per share for easyJet, exceeding Castlelake’s previous £6.90-per-share proposal.
• The £5.7 billion bid has triggered a major private equity battle for one of Europe’s largest low-cost airlines.
• easyJet shareholders must now consider competing takeover offers that could determine the airline’s future direction.
• Regulatory approval and European ownership rules will play a key role in deciding the outcome of any deal.

Read the full article: Apollo Launches £5.7 Billion Bid for easyJet as Private Equity Battle Intensifies
